title: First Release
description: The site is published for the first time on GitHub Pages with a simple landing page.

title: Introduction to React
description: The site is rewritten in React for better state management and interactions.

title: Projects Section Added
description: Implemented the Projects section with a list of personal and professional projects.

title: GitHub API Integration
description: The site now shows recent GitHub repositories via the GitHub API.

title: Responsive Design
description: Redesigned the layout to be fully responsive on mobile devices and tablets.

title: Blog Section Added
description: Implemented the Blog section with articles on web development and technology.

title: SEO & Performance
description: SEO optimizations and performance improvements across the site.

title: Dark Mode
description: Implemented dark mode with ThemeSwitch and persisted via localStorage.

title: Animated Grid Demo
description: Added the animated grid game demo with Framer Motion and GSAP.
